title: WM Leler — GDSC Speaker Invitation Email
html:
Cold/warm-reconnect email Yahir drafted to wm leler (met at google devfest portland) inviting him to speak at osu gdsc (Google Developer Student Club, Oregon State) — Yahir flags himself as founding member.

TL;DR

  • osu gdsc outreach: Yahir is a founding member, drafting a guest-speaker invite to wm leler.
  • Connection thread: google devfest portland networking → speaker pipeline.
  • Template for Yahir's outreach emails style — warm reference to past meeting, flexible scheduling, emphasis on member impact.
  • Counter-evidence to "Yahir doesn't network" narrative — he's actively building the oregon state tech-community surface.

wm leler · osu gdsc · google devfest portland · oregon state · outreach emails
